zh.galloway scotland: 英國蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mariotte MacGillebride於1168年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特金泰爾時，她的父親Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair49歲，母親Mariotte MacGillebride49歲。她於大約1188年與Iye Hugh Eth Mackie在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.galloway scotland: 英国苏格兰吉德布萊次爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mariotte MacGillebride于1168年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特金泰爾时，她的父亲Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair49岁，母亲Mariotte MacGillebride49岁。她于大约1188年与Iye Hugh Eth Mackie在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Mariotte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mariotte MacGillebride was born in 1168, in Kintyre, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair, was 49 and her mother, Mariotte MacGillebride, was 49. She married Iye Hugh Eth Mackie about 1188, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons.

fr.Kintyre, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, Unit: Kintyre, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mariotte MacGillebride est née en 1168, à Kintyre, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Mariotte MacGillebride, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Iye Hugh Eth Mackie environ 1188, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils.

de.Kintyre, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, Unit: Kintyre, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Mariotte MacGillebride 1168 in Kintyre, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair 49 und ihre Mutter Mariotte MacGillebride 49. Sie hat um 1188 in Scotland Iye Hugh Eth Mackie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne.

Lei sposato Iye Hugh Eth Mackie circa 1188, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli.

ja.lifeSummary: Mariotte MacGillebrideが1168年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトキントイアで生まれた時，父Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandairは49歳，母Mariotte MacGillebrideは49歳であった。約1188年にスコットランドでIye Hugh Eth Mackieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。

ko.Kintyre, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, Unit: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킨타이어
ko.lifeSummary: Mariotte MacGillebride(이)가 1168년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킨타이어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mariotte MacGillebride(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 대략 1188년 스컷랜드에서 Iye Hugh Eth Mackie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mariotte MacGillebride nasceu em 1168, em Kintyre, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Mariotte MacGillebride, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com Iye Hugh Eth Mackie aproximadamente 1188, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos.

ru.Kintyre, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, Unit: кинтир, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mariotte MacGillebride родилась в 1168 г. в местности кинтир, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Máel Coluim Mac Alaxandair было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariotte MacGillebride, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Iye Hugh Eth Mackie около 1188 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей.
